✦ ✦ ✦

Hi, I'm Liliya ✦

Unity Game Developer

I'm a Unity game developer passionate about creating polished, engaging experiences that bring joy to players. I specialize in WebGL games that run directly in the browser — no downloads, no barriers, just fun.

My projects focus on tight, satisfying gameplay loops — from physics-based puzzles to arcade-style action games. I love the challenge of making something that feels great to play from the very first moment.

Skills

  • ✦ Unity (C#)
  • ✦ WebGL build pipeline
  • ✦ Game & level design
  • ✦ Physics & animation
  • ✦ UI/UX for games
  • ✦ Shader Graph basics

Currently Working On

More games! Check back soon for new additions to the collection.

Get In Touch

Found a bug? Want to collaborate? Feel free to reach out via GitHub.
